name: animejs
when_to_use: For complex multi-property CSS/SVG animations, staggered animations across many elements, SVG path morphing, or when Remotion's spring/interpolate is insufficient for the desired effect
forbidden_patterns: Do NOT call anime() to create running animations — Remotion controls timing via frames
Do NOT use anime.timeline() for playback — use Remotion's Sequence/Series for timing
Use anime.js only for VALUE COMPUTATION (stagger, path, easing functions), not for DOM manipulation
remotion_integration_notes: Anime.js is best used as a utility library in Remotion for computing stagger values, easing curves, and SVG path coordinates. Do not let it manage its own animation loop.
